audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:trước hết + clause; tiếp theo + clause]]. Use trước hết for the first step and tiếp theo for the next step. This chapter teaches [[grammar:numeral + cái + inanimate noun]]. Put a number before cái and an ordinary inanimate noun when counting suitable objects.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:trước hết + clause; tiếp theo + clause]]: Trước hết and tiếp theo form an ordered discourse sequence and together constitute one sequencing construction. This chapter introduces [[grammar:numeral + cái + inanimate noun]]: The numeral–classifier–noun order is introduced with cái as a broad inanimate classifier; actual classifier choice remains lexically constrained.

audienceSections.normal:
#### trước hết + clause; tiếp theo + clause

Use trước hết for the first step and tiếp theo for the next step. Example: [[grammar:Trước hết, tôi kiểm kê.]]

#### numeral + cái + inanimate noun

Put a number before cái and an ordinary inanimate noun when counting suitable objects. Example: [[grammar:Có một cái hộp.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### trước hết + clause; tiếp theo + clause

Trước hết and tiếp theo form an ordered discourse sequence and together constitute one sequencing construction. Literal example: [[grammar:Trước hết, tôi kiểm kê.]]

#### numeral + cái + inanimate noun

The numeral–classifier–noun order is introduced with cái as a broad inanimate classifier; actual classifier choice remains lexically constrained. Literal example: [[grammar:Có một cái hộp.]]

audienceSections.normal: Vietnamese counting generally places numeral before classifier before noun. Cái is broad but not universally interchangeable with every classifier.
audienceSections.expert: Vietnamese counting generally places numeral before classifier before noun. Cái is broad but not universally interchangeable with every classifier. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Trước hết, tôi kiểm kê.]] — First, I take inventory.
- [[grammar:Số lượng ở đây.]] — The quantities are here.
- [[grammar:Có một cái hộp.]] — There is one box.
- [[grammar:Có hai cái túi.]] — There are two bags.
- [[grammar:Có ba cái bàn.]] — There are three tables.
- [[grammar:Có bốn cái ghế.]] — There are four chairs.
- [[grammar:Có năm cái đèn.]] — There are five lights.
- [[grammar:Đây là số không.]] — This is the number zero.
- [[grammar:Tiếp theo, tôi viết số lượng.]] — Next, I write the quantities.
- [[grammar:Kiểm kê đã xong.]] — The inventory check is complete.
- [[grammar:Số lượng là năm.]] — The quantity is five.
- [[grammar:Vâng.]] — Yes.
